body:
This PR creates a new tutorial section for `Simulation`, and adds `Callbacks` and `OutputWriters` to it. I'd also like to flesh it out a bit and include some documentation of how schedules work. This is a WIP.

preview at https://clima.github.io/OceananigansDocumentation/previews/PR4834/simulations/simulations_overview/
title: Create a Simulation tutorial + few fixes for DateTime clocks

body: Highlighting the evolving nature of Oceananigans development and adding credits for testing/CI infrastructure.
title: Update blurb about Oceananigans contributors in README and docs
